raw_input.title: Technical Product Owner
raw_input.job_html_or_text: Own API roadmap, translate customer automation needs into product requirements, partner with engineering, and improve delivery metrics. Product owner experience preferred.

profile.base_cv_text:
Ignacio Rodriguez
Backend and full-stack engineer with Python, APIs, stakeholder collaboration, dashboards, automation delivery, Fiction Express, Talan Consulting, Globant, and Balloon Group.
